raw_consumer_statement: I purchased what was supposed to be a very rare coin, only later to find out by a third party grading company that it is not authentic. I filed a dispute with citi card for the {$7500.00} charge made to my card. The seller, gold standard auctions refuses to refund my money for this coin that has been proven to be not authentic, even though they boast '' guaranteed authenticity ''. I paid {$8000.00} for this coin with both a credit card and a personal check. I was scammed by XXXX XXXX XXXX  ( XXXX ) out of a lot money and need help to recover my loss. Please help me?
